title: The Journey's End
overview: The world celebrates the Demon King's defeat at the hands of the Hero and his companions. Now that their great adventure is over, what will Frieren the mage do next?

title: It Didn't Have to Be Magic...
overview: Frieren instructs Fern in the use of magic while deciphering a grimoire for Heiter.

title: Killing Magic
overview: While retracing the path she took on her adventure with her former traveling companions, Frieren confronts an old enemy.

title: The Land Where Souls Rest
overview: Frieren and Fern pay a visit to Eisen, who requests their help in finding the notes of Flamme the Legendary Mage.

title: Phantoms of the Dead
overview: Frieren and Fern investigate ghost sightings at a village where people have started going missing.

title: The Hero of the Village
overview: Frieren and Fern enlist Stark's help to fight the solar dragon - but is he up to the task?

title: Like a Fairy Tale
overview: After reflecting on the transient nature of the past as it exists in people's collective memories, Frieren unexpectedly runs into a sworn enemy.

title: Frieren the Slayer
overview: As tensions in Graf Granat's domain reach a breaking point, Fern and Stark find their own resolve - and Frieren resumes an old duty.

title: Aura the Guillotine
overview: While Fern and Stark make a temporary retreat with Graf Granat, Frieren's true foe awaits her outside the city.

title: A Powerful Mage
overview: Frieren's many years of training under her teacher Flamme are tested in her confrontation with Aura the Guillotine. Will Aura's scales find her wanting?

title: Winter in the Northern Lands
overview: Frieren and her companions continue their journey through the northern lands, but obstacles both natural and manmade still stand in their way.

title: A Real Hero
overview: Deep in the mountains of the northern lands, Frieren and her party arrive at the Village of the Sword, where they have another job to do.

title: Aversion to One's Own Kind
overview: While passing by a village in the woods of the northern lands, Frieren and party meet Sein, a gifted priest who is nonetheless corrupt enough to give even Heiter a run for his money. But what happened in his past?

title: Privilege of the Young
overview: The party arrives in a large and lively town with a bustling shopping district that Frieren once visited with Himmel, but something seems to have come up between Fern and Stark.

title: Smells Like Trouble
overview: When the party happens upon a town whose inhabitants are all mysteriously asleep, it's time for their newest traveling companion to prove his mettle.

title: Long-Lived Friends
overview: Frieren pays a visit to Old Man Voll, a long-lived friend of hers, with traveling companions in tow.

title: Take Care
overview: Now that Sein finally has a lead on the whereabouts of his long-lost friend, is it time for him and Frieren's party to part ways?

title: First-Class Mage Exam
overview: Frieren and party finally arrive in Äußerst, ready to undergo the first-class mage exam, and meet a number of colorful characters who are there to do the same.

title: Well-Laid Plans
overview: Frieren and her new teammates hatch a plan to capture a Stille - but are the other teams just going to stand by and let it happen?

title: Necessary Killing
overview: The first-class mage exam intensifies as fighting breaks out between the participants - and what's at stake might even be worth killing for.

title: The World of Magic
overview: Frieren, Kanne, and Lawine struggle with the 13th party over possession of the Stille, but there'll be more surprises in store before their battle, and the first test, reach their conclusion.

title: Future Enemies
overview: After the conclusion of the first test, the exam participants have some time to kill in town. What do mages get up to on their days off?

title: Conquering the Labyrinth
overview: The aspiring first-class mages now face their second test: conquering the Ruins of the King's Tomb. A simple task, or so the proctor claims, but there's a reason this particular dungeon remains unexplored.

title: Perfect Replicas
overview: Due to the Spiegel, a legendary monster that can create perfect replicas of others, the test-takers who would conquer the Ruins of the King's Tomb must first face the ultimate enemy: themselves.

title: A Fatal Vulnerability
overview: A perfect imitation of Frieren stands between the test-takers and victory, but Fern believes she knows how to win. Is it time for the student to surpass the master?

title: The Height of Magic
overview: To defeat Spiegel, Frieren and Fern fight against Frieren's replica, but have a tough time. Meanwhile, Denken, Lavine, and the others fight against the replicas, but the magic of Sense, a first-class mage and the exam's proctor, rages.

title: An Era of Humans
overview: With the second test behind them, only one remains - but first, Frieren and Fern need to settle an important matter in town. What awaits them in the third test?

title: It Would Be Embarrassing When We Met Again
overview: As the first-class mage exam concludes and the test-takers go their separate ways, farewell leads to departure - but the next stage of Frieren's journey has only just begun.

title: Shall We Go, Then?
overview: Frieren, Fern, and Stark leave the magic city of Äußerst behind and travel along a road in the northern lands.

title: The Hero of the South
overview: In a village in the northern lands, Frieren’s party are hired to polish a statue of a hero.

title: Somewhere She'd Like
overview: Frieren’s party dream of hot springs as they reach Etwas, but the village is abandoned.

title: Other People's Homes
overview: Stark only asked Fern out as a joke, but the two end up going on a date.

title: Logistics in the Northern Plateau
overview: Frieren is reunited with Fass the dwarf, who has been searching for the Boshaft liquor for over 200 years.

title: A Demon-Slaying Request
overview: A village on the Northern Plateau is wiped out, and the victims' distinctive wounds point to a certain demon.

title: The Divine Revolte
overview: Frieren, Fern, and Methode enter the woods to look for the four-armed Divine Revolte.

title: A Magnificent End
overview: The Divine Revolte appears at the village, while Frieren, Fern, and Methode battle Solide and Hemmung.

title: Himmel's Memoirs
overview: When Frieren's party cannot afford the fare to cross Lake Korridor, the captain proposes a trade.

title: A Beautiful Sight
overview: Hidden within the massive bridge spanning the Great Canyon Tor is a secret story of Himmel and Gehen.
